info.title: Watchdog with Your Infrastructure
info.description: Unified API for managing Tempo, Loki, AlertManager, Grafana, and Resolver

410.description: Legacy query token validation is disabled; use POST endpoint

204.description: Grafana auth_request endpoint; returns authorization headers for upstream proxying.

401.description: The supplied Grafana auth token or session is missing, expired, or invalid.

get.description: Returns service metadata and primary API endpoint links.
Returns a lightweight health status for watchdog.

200.description: The current health status for watchdog.

get.description: Runs readiness checks required for watchdog to serve traffic.

200.description: The readiness result and dependency checks.

503.description: One or more required dependencies are unavailable
